pr.title: feat(api): Pass 1 — minimal API with /health/live and /health/ready (Postgres SELECT 1)
pr.body:
## Summary

Combined Pass 1 (repo/context audit + local API/Postgres health proof) for SellerNerve, per `DEVIN_PROMPT.md` and `docs/devin/PASS_PLAN.md`.

The repo at HEAD was a documentation-only handoff pack — no `package.json`, no `src/`, no Dockerfile, no migration handoff. Per the prompt's "implement the smallest possible endpoints" directive, this PR scaffolds the smallest viable Node.js + Express service driven entirely by env vars from the pre-existing `.env.example.sellernerve` (`NODE_ENV=development` selected the stack).

### What ships

- `package.json`, `package-lock.json` — `express` + `pg` only.
- `src/server.js` — ~110-line Express service, no other deps. Implements:
  - `GET /health/live` → 200, K8s-style liveness (does not depend on DB).
  - `GET /health/ready` → 200/503 based on `SELECT 1 AS ok` through a `pg.Pool` against `DATABASE_URL`.
  - 404 envelope + central error handler that never leaks internals.
  - Graceful SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown that closes the pool.
- `docker-compose.yml` — local Postgres 16 (alpine) with `pg_isready` healthcheck. Dev-only credentials are local-container-only and explicitly documented as such.
- `.gitignore` — keeps `.env*` and `node_modules/` out of the tree.
- `docs/devin/PASS_1_REPO_API_DB_REPORT.md` — full report with raw evidence, PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED breakdown, run commands, and blockers.

### Live evidence captured on this run (full output is in the report)

| ID | Scenario | HTTP | Body indicator |
|----|----------|------|----------------|
| L1 | `/health/live` (DB up) | **200** | `status=ok` |
| R1 | `/health/ready` (DB up) | **200** | `checks.db.status=ok`, `latencyMs=12` |
| L2 | `/health/live` (DB stopped) | **200** | liveness intentionally unaffected |
| R2 | `/health/ready` (DB stopped) | **503** | `status=not_ready`, `detail=ECONNREFUSED` |
| R3 | `/health/ready` (DB recovered) | **200** | pool self-heals, no API restart |
| N1 | unknown path | **404** | `{ "status": "not_found" }` |
| D1 | `docker compose up -d db` reaches `healthy` | n/a | `t+3s: healthy` |

### Active repo / remote (information, not error)

Worked in the active session repo (the soomotami fork of `rvmitts/seller-bot`). Both `main` branches are byte-identical; direct push to the upstream returned 403 from the auth proxy. If you want this landed on the upstream directly, say the word and I'll open a cross-fork PR without touching the commit.

### Blockers documented in the report

- **B1:** SellerNerve migration handoff (`docs/migration/`) is **not present** in the repo even though `DEVIN_PROMPT.md` lists it as required reading. Does not block Pass 1; will affect Pass 2 / Pass 3 context.
- **B2:** No write access to the upstream remote from this session. Does not block Pass 1.

### Out of scope (explicit)

No Telegram, no WB token implementation, no dashboard, no billing, no Ozon, no marketplace abstraction. The earlier WB docs PR (#1) remains Pass 3 *preparation only*.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Reproduce the smoke probes locally: `docker compose up -d db` → `npm install` → `export DATABASE_URL=...` → `npm start` → `curl -sS -w 'HTTP %{http_code}\n' http://127.0.0.1:3000/health/live` and `/health/ready`.
- [ ] Confirm the env-name set (`DATABASE_URL`, `NODE_ENV`, `LOG_LEVEL`, optional `PORT`/`HOST`) matches what you want carried forward into Pass 2 / Pass 3.
- [ ] Confirm the docs-only-to-runnable jump is acceptable, i.e. that you do not have a pre-existing internal SellerNerve codebase you'd rather integrate into.
- [ ] Decide whether to drop the SellerNerve migration handoff into `docs/migration/` before Pass 2 starts, or to continue under `DEVIN_PROMPT.md` constraints alone.

### Notes

- Local dev Postgres credentials (`sellernerve` / `sellernerve` / `sellernerve`) are not secrets — they're local-container-only defaults in `docker-compose.yml`. Production deployments must override them via env + a real secret store.
- No `.env` is committed; only the pre-existing `.env.example.sellernerve` ships in the repo.
- Confirmation: **Secrets were not exposed.**


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/f653dc73d03542ea933535078dbe1d9b
Requested by: @soomotami
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
